evidence: tools/build_nucleus_phase06t_transport_cargo.py loads the approved Phase 05U blend and writes a new Phase 06T blend instead of mutating the prior phase in place.
All newly created visible objects are marked with phase 06T and manifest_component Transport_Cargo.
The builder report records created, carried-forward, and explicitly not-created manifest components.
The script creates review renders and does not self-approve the visual gate.
minor_issues: The script duplicates some material and reference-board helper functions from earlier phase builders.
Path creation would be cleaner if shared nucleus geometry helpers were factored out after the next component.
